description: Deterministic truth pack for Lane 3 cross-substrate queries spanning installed_base, po_pricing, and MSR substrates.

items.query: top 5 vendors by spend on installed parts in NEXION
items.ground_truth_sql: WITH latest_parts AS (SELECT DISTINCT part_number FROM installed_base WHERE system='NEXION' AND part_number!='') SELECT vendor, SUM(COALESCE(unit_price,0) * COALESCE(NULLIF(qty,0),1)) AS total_spend FROM po_pricing WHERE system='NEXION' AND part_number IN latest_parts GROUP BY vendor ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5;

items.query: top 3 vendors by spend on installed parts in NEXION in 2024
items.ground_truth_sql: WITH latest_parts AS (SELECT DISTINCT part_number FROM installed_base WHERE system='NEXION' AND part_number!='') SELECT vendor, SUM(COALESCE(unit_price,0) * COALESCE(NULLIF(qty,0),1)) AS total_spend FROM po_pricing WHERE system='NEXION' AND CAST(substr(po_date,1,4) AS INTEGER)=2024 AND part_number IN latest_parts GROUP BY vendor ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 3;

items.query: first install date per site in NEXION
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT site_token, MIN(COALESCE(NULLIF(install_date,''), NULLIF(snapshot_date,''))) AS first_install_date FROM installed_base WHERE system='NEXION' AND site_token!='' GROUP BY site_token ORDER BY first_install_date ASC LIMIT 25;

items.query: first install date per site in ISTO
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT site_token, MIN(COALESCE(NULLIF(install_date,''), NULLIF(snapshot_date,''))) AS first_install_date FROM installed_base WHERE system='ISTO' AND site_token!='' GROUP BY site_token ORDER BY first_install_date ASC LIMIT 25;

items.query: ASV completions per site per year in NEXION from 2024-2024
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT site_token, visit_year, COUNT(*) AS completion_count FROM msr_asv WHERE system='NEXION' AND visit_year BETWEEN 2024 AND 2024 AND site_token!='' GROUP BY site_token, visit_year ORDER BY visit_year ASC, completion_count DESC, site_token ASC;

items.query: ASV completions per site per year in ISTO from 2024-2024
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT site_token, visit_year, COUNT(*) AS completion_count FROM msr_asv WHERE system='ISTO' AND visit_year BETWEEN 2024 AND 2024 AND site_token!='' GROUP BY site_token, visit_year ORDER BY visit_year ASC, completion_count DESC, site_token ASC;

items.query: cost per failure for top parts
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT fe.part_number, fe.cnt as failure_count, COALESCE(pp.avg_price,0) as avg_unit_price, fe.cnt * COALESCE(pp.avg_price,0) as total_cost FROM (SELECT part_number, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM failure_events WHERE part_number!='' GROUP BY part_number) fe LEFT JOIN (SELECT part_number, AVG(unit_price) as avg_price FROM po_pricing WHERE unit_price>0 GROUP BY part_number) pp ON fe.part_number=pp.part_number ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 10;

items.query: cost per failure for top parts in GOTHAM

items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT vendor, COUNT(*) as po_count, SUM(unit_price * COALESCE(qty,1)) as total_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT part_number) as distinct_parts FROM po_pricing WHERE vendor!='' GROUP BY vendor ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10;
